name: AWS SageMaker Notebook Instance Creation or Update with Default Execution Role
description: Creation or update of an Amazon SageMaker notebook instance with the default execution role can lead to potential security risks. Using the default role may unintentionally grant excessive permissions, increasing the likelihood of privilege escalation or unauthorized actions. Monitoring for such activities helps ensure that least-privilege roles are enforced to maintain security integrity.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Notebook Instance Creation or Update with Default Execution Role

author: Sunil Bharti and Yash Verma
